channel.title: mbAInewsletter
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from mbAInewsletter, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: FAA halts all flights at El Paso International Airport for 10 days for 'special security reasons'
item.description: All flights to and from the El Paso International Airport are being grounded for 10 days, the Federal Aviation Administration announced Tuesday.
